plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Orchestrator workflow with gated phases for designing, implementing, reviewing, and documenting features (.NET / Go / React / Next.js / Angular).

plugins.name: project-init
plugins.description: .NET 10 modular monolith scaffolder — initializes a solution and adds modules following the architecture of Jared0o/Ecommerce (Mediator, Result<T>, EF Core+Postgres, xunit+Testcontainers).
